entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: A legume crop studied for its natural outcrossing rates in China

entities.name: CHINA
entities.description: The country where the research on pigeon pea outcrossing was conducted

entities.name: NANNING
entities.description: The city in Guangxi province where the experiment was conducted

entities.name: GUANGXI PROVINCE
entities.description: The province in China where the experiment was conducted

entities.name: ICPL 87091
entities.description: A specific variety of pigeon pea used in the outcrossing experiment

entities.name: BREEDING LINE
entities.description: A pigeon pea line with indeterminate growth habit used for crossing

entities.name: INDETERMINATE GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: A growth characteristic of the breeding line used in the study

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: A trait matched between ICPL 87091 and the breeding line to facilitate crossing

entities.name: NATURAL OUTCROSSING
entities.description: The process of pollen transfer between different plants, measured as a percentage in the study

entities.name: INSECT
entities.description: Pollinators active in the field during the flowering stage

entities.name: HONEY BEES
entities.description: The predominant type of insect pollinator observed in the field
